company_name: 学校法人 北工学園
hunter_likelihood_reason: Official/public evidence mainly indicates non-headhunter verticals: childcare (こども学科), nursing care (介護福祉科), medical welfare education.
notes: Static candidate URL http://megumigakuen.jp/ was incorrect (different company 西条めぐみ学園 in Ehime). Used Google search to find correct company: 学校法人北工学園, a school corporation operating Higashikawa International Culture and Welfare College (fukusen.ac.jp). Found public email fukusen@hokko.ac.jp and contact inquiry form on official school site footer. Phone 0166-82-4520 and address matches MHLW data.
